name: TC-SF-003 — GET /api/v1/fetch/status: service="spr-fetcher-service" and status="UP"
description:
**What this test does:**
Checks two key identity fields in the status response:
- service must equal "spr-fetcher-service"
- status must equal "UP"

**Why it matters:**
The "service" field confirms the correct microservice responded (not a different service behind a misconfigured route). The "status" field confirms the service considers itself healthy. If status is not "UP", no trigger calls should be made.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Checks two key identity fields in the status response:

  • service must equal "spr-fetcher-service"
  • status must equal "UP"

Why it matters:
The "service" field confirms the correct microservice responded (not a different service behind a misconfigured route). The "status" field confirms the service considers itself healthy. If status is not "UP", no trigger calls should be made.
